slots.title: Noise calibration (imx662 gain 256×)
slots.purpose: NEW captures for the 5-phase noise model — separate from PI_RAW scenes.
slots.how_to_capture:
Shoot on the Pi with IMX662 at fixed analogue gain (e.g. 256× for night). This folder is NOT inside PI_RAW/Data — it lives beside PI_RAW.

Subfolders: bias/ (lens cap, min exposure), dark/ (lens cap, normal exposure), flat/level_XX/ (uniform light pairs a+b).

slots.title: bias/ — read noise
slots.purpose: Lens capped, minimal exposure. Measures read noise + ADC offset.
slots.how_to_capture: Lens cap ON · shortest exposure · 5+ frames · bias_00.dng …

slots.title: dark/ — row noise
slots.purpose: Lens capped, normal exposure at the IMX662 night gain.
slots.how_to_capture: Lens cap ON · analogue gain 256× · normal exposure · 3+ frames

slots.title: flat/ — shot noise curve
slots.purpose: 10–15 brightness levels; each level_XX/ holds a.dng + b.dng.
slots.how_to_capture: Uniform grey card · two frames per level · same exposure/gain.

slots.title: flat/level_01/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 1.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_02/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 2.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_03/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 3.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_04/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 4.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_05/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 5.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_06/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 6.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_07/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 7.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_08/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 8.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_09/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 9.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_10/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 10.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_11/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 11.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: flat/level_12/
slots.purpose: Flat-field pair at brightness step 12.
slots.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

slots.title: cabinet_D_10/imx662_ag12_test
slots.purpose: Synthesized night-vision pair for scene 'cabinet_D_10' at tag ag12. Created by Noise Dataset Wizard / simulate_dataset.py — NOT shot on camera.
slots.how_to_capture:
1. Calibrate noise model from calibration/ folder.
2. Put clean GT in clean_scenes/ (copy from existing PI_RAW gt.* with 'USE EXISTING GT' in Studio, or temporal burst).
3. Run synthesis → writes noisy.* + gt.* here.

Note: 'ag12' is a denoise-hw folder tag (manager used ag1, ag2, ag4, ag8, ag12 for IMX219). IMX662 low-light may need ag24/ag48 folders even though calibration uses gain 256/512.

2. Put clean GT in clean_scenes/ (copy from existing PI_RAW gt.* with 'USE EXISTING GT' in Studio, or temporal burst).
3. Run synthesis → writes noisy.* + gt.* here.

Note: 'ag48' is a denoise-hw folder tag (manager used ag1, ag2, ag4, ag8, ag12 for IMX219). IMX662 low-light may need ag24/ag48 folders even though calibration uses gain 256/512.

noise_pipeline.title: Noise calibration (imx662 gain 256×)
noise_pipeline.purpose: NEW captures for the 5-phase noise model — separate from PI_RAW scenes.
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture:
Shoot on the Pi with IMX662 at fixed analogue gain (e.g. 256× for night). This folder is NOT inside PI_RAW/Data — it lives beside PI_RAW.

Subfolders: bias/ (lens cap, min exposure), dark/ (lens cap, normal exposure), flat/level_XX/ (uniform light pairs a+b).

noise_pipeline.title: bias/ — read noise
noise_pipeline.purpose: Lens capped, minimal exposure. Measures read noise + ADC offset.
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: Lens cap ON · shortest exposure · 5+ frames · bias_00.dng …

noise_pipeline.title: dark/ — row noise
noise_pipeline.purpose: Lens capped, normal exposure at the IMX662 night gain.
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: Lens cap ON · analogue gain 256× · normal exposure · 3+ frames

noise_pipeline.title: flat/ — shot noise curve
noise_pipeline.purpose: 10–15 brightness levels; each level_XX/ holds a.dng + b.dng.
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: Uniform grey card · two frames per level · same exposure/gain.

noise_pipeline.title: flat/level_01/
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

noise_pipeline.title: flat/level_02/
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

noise_pipeline.title: flat/level_03/
noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

noise_pipeline.how_to_capture: a.dng and b.dng at the same light level.

Note: 'ag24' is a denoise-hw folder tag (manager used ag1, ag2, ag4, ag8, ag12 for IMX219). IMX662 low-light may need ag24/ag48 folders even though calibration uses gain 256/512.

imx662_targets.title: colour_stripes/imx662_ag48_test
imx662_targets.purpose: Synthesized night-vision pair for scene 'colour_stripes' at tag ag48. Created by Noise Dataset Wizard / simulate_dataset.py — NOT shot on camera.
imx662_targets.how_to_capture:
1. Calibrate noise model from calibration/ folder.
2. Put clean GT in clean_scenes/ (copy from existing PI_RAW gt.* with 'USE EXISTING GT' in Studio, or temporal burst).
3. Run synthesis → writes noisy.* + gt.* here.

Note: 'ag48' is a denoise-hw folder tag (manager used ag1, ag2, ag4, ag8, ag12 for IMX219). IMX662 low-light may need ag24/ag48 folders even though calibration uses gain 256/512.
